nodes.name: Schedule — 11pm Nightly
nodes.notes: Fires every night at 11pm. Adjust cron expression if a different time is preferred.

nodes.name: Foresight — Run Health Scan
nodes.notes: Calls sf_run_nightly_health_scan on Railway. 2-minute timeout for large account sets.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ text: $('Parse Scan Results').first().json.slackCriticalMessage || 'Foresight critical alert fired but message was empty.' }) }}

nodes.name: Slack — #churn-alerts (Critical)
nodes.notes: Posts to #churn-alerts Slack channel. Set SLACK_CHURN_WEBHOOK variable in n8n (Settings → Variables) to your Slack Incoming Webhook URL.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ text: $('Parse Scan Results').first().json.slackDropMessage || 'Foresight tier drop alert fired but message was empty.' }) }}

nodes.name: Slack — #churn-alerts (Drops)
nodes.notes: Posts tier drop summary to #churn-alerts when no Critical accounts. Same webhook as critical alert.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ text: $('Parse Scan Results').first().json.slackLogMessage || 'Foresight daily scan complete.' }) }}

nodes.name: Slack — #foresight-log (Daily)
nodes.notes: Posts daily scan summary to #foresight-log (or any ops channel) regardless of outcomes. Set SLACK_LOG_WEBHOOK variable in n8n.

meta.description: PDM Workflow 3 — Runs nightly at 11pm. Calls sf_run_nightly_health_scan on Railway, parses results, posts Critical account alerts to #churn-alerts and a daily summary to #foresight-log. Requires: (1) SLACK_CHURN_WEBHOOK variable in n8n Settings → Variables, (2) SLACK_LOG_WEBHOOK variable. Both are Slack Incoming Webhook URLs.
